image.title: NAH Greenspan, R San José Estépar, WJ Niessen, E Siegel, M Nielsen

item.title: Position paper on COVID-19 imaging and AI: From the clinical needs and technological challenges to initial AI solutions at the lab and national level towards a new era for AI in healthcare.
